most_effective_strategies.strategy: Graph Strategy: We currently have no Twitter-derived data about Tesla stock (TSLA). The most coherent next step is to fill basic observational gaps: capture real-time public sentiment and news about TSLA, collect direct signals from the CEO and corporate account that often move the stock, check whether Tesla/TSLA is trending, and map a small network signal (who Elon follows) to identify likely influential sources/opinion leaders. This foundational collection will enable later deep dives (conversation threads, influencer mapping, quantitative sentiment tracking). The plan uses multiple endpoints to satisfy the diversity requirement and to provide complementary perspectives (search for broad public discourse, timelines for authoritative sources, trends to measure volume, and following for network context).
